notable_excerpts: We have been sharing this investment into EVs and what it does to our overall margins.
Our factory -- the last factory that we started, which is in Tirupati district, which is where we produce our EVs today, is ramping up and ramping up very well.

As part of our planned operational strategy, the Company implemented a temporary production halt from April 17 to 19 at its Dharuhera, Gurugram, Haridwar and Neemrana facilities to facilitate supply chain alignment and conduct scheduled maintenance and infrastructure enhancements.
We salute our armed forces for protecting the nation and keeping us all safe.
We remain consistent in our commitment towards investing behind premium, scooters and EV portfolio; and to improve customer experience in stores with Hero 2.0 and Premia.
We continue to maintain market leadership, with sales of 5.9 million vehicles in the financial year 2024-25.
I'm happy to share that the Company has declared a final dividend of ₹65 per equity share.
We have acquired 34.1% stake in Euler Motors for an investment of ₹510 crores, which make Euler Motors an Associate Company of Hero MotoCorp.
Our continued focus on cash management resulted in delivering strong cash from operations, strengthening our financial performance.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call highlighted Hero MotoCorp's strategic focus on environmental sustainability through EV investments and supply chain improvements. Social aspects were addressed through community acknowledgments and market leadership, though lacking depth in employee and diversity topics. Governance was strong with clear financial disclosures and strategic investments, indicating robust risk management.
strengths: Strong governance with clear financial disclosures
Significant investment in EVs and renewable energy
weaknesses: Limited discussion on employee diversity and inclusion
Lack of specific environmental targets or metrics
